changeSet.author: pvorobiev
changeSet.sql: update config.robots_properties T set value = '//*[@class="DesktopCaptcha-captchaForm"]' from config.robots_properties RP join config.robots R on RP.robot_id = R.id where T.id = RP.id and RP.key = 'search-system-xpath-captcha' and lower(R.orig_name) like '%mail.ru%';
